get.description: Retrieve all configured association limits between objects, which include details about how different CRM object types are associated with each other.
Retrieve the configuration details for associations between two specified CRM object types. Use this endpoint to understand limits that have been set for specific association types.

post.description: Batch configure association limits between two object types.
Batch delete limits that have been defined for association types between two object types.
Batch update association limits that have been configured between two object types.

get.description: Retrieve all labels that describe the relationships between two specified CRM object types. These labels provide context about the nature of the associations.

put.description: Update an existing label that describes the relationship between two specified CRM object types. This allows for modifications to existing association labels to better reflect the nature of the relationship.

post.description: Create a new label that describes the relationship between two specified CRM object types. This can help in categorizing and managing associations more effectively.

delete.description: Remove a specific label from the association between two CRM object types.

inverseLabel.description: An optional descriptor that clarifies the reverse relationship in the association.

label.description: A descriptor that provides context about the relationship between two associated CRM objects.

name.description: The unique identifier for the association definition.

category.description: The main category of the error.

context.description: Additional context-specific information related to the error.

id.description: A unique ID for the error instance.

links.description: URLs linking to documentation or resources associated with the error.

message.description: A human-readable string describing the error and possible remediation steps.

status.description: The HTTP status code associated with the error.

subCategory.description: A more specific error category within each main category.

StandardError.description: Represents a standard error response in the HubSpot API, providing detailed information about an error that occurred during an API request.

completedAt.description: The date and time when the batch update operation was completed.

links.description: URLs linking to documentation or resources associated with the batch update operation.

requestedAt.description: The date and time when the batch update operation was requested.

startedAt.description: The date and time when the batch update operation started.

status.description: The current status of the batch update operation, which can be CANCELED, COMPLETE, PENDING, or PROCESSING.

category.description: The category of the association, which can be HUBSPOT_DEFINED, INTEGRATOR_DEFINED, or USER_DEFINED.

typeId.description: An integer value used to uniquely identify a specific association type within its Association Category.

userEnforcedMaxToObjectIds.description: The maximum number of object IDs that a user can enforce for associations.

correlationId.description: A unique identifier for the request. Include this value with any error reports or support tickets

links.description: A map of link names to associated URIs containing documentation about the error or recommended remediation steps

message.description: A human readable message describing the error along with remediation steps where appropriate

subCategory.description: A specific category that contains more specific detail about the error

example.message: Invalid input (details will vary based on the error)

category.description: Specifies the category of the association, which can be HUBSPOT_DEFINED, INTEGRATOR_DEFINED, or USER_DEFINED.

maxToObjectIds.description: Defines the maximum number of target object IDs that can be associated.

typeId.description: A unique identifier for the association type.

category.description: Specifies the category of the association, which can be HUBSPOT_DEFINED, INTEGRATOR_DEFINED, or USER_DEFINED.

maxToObjectIds.description: The maximum number of target object IDs that can be associated with a single source object.

typeId.description: An integer used to uniquely identify a specific association type within its category.

associationTypeId.description: The unique identifier for the association type.

inverseLabel.description: An optional descriptor for the inverse relationship between associated records.

label.description: A descriptor that provides context about the relationship between associated records.

code.description: The status code associated with the error detail

in.description: The name of the field or parameter in which the error was found.

message.description: A human readable message describing the error along with remediation steps where appropriate

subCategory.description: A specific category that contains more specific detail about the error

category.description: Association category. Can be HUBSPOT_DEFINED, USER_DEFINED, INTEGRATOR_DEFINED or WORK

label.description: An optional descriptor that provides additional context about the relationship between associated records, such as "Mentor" and "Mentee".

typeId.description: An integer value used to uniquely identify a specific association type within its Association Category.

AssociationSpecWithLabel.description: Defines the type, direction, and details of the relationship between two CRM objects.

category.description: The category of the association, which can be HUBSPOT_DEFINED, INTEGRATOR_DEFINED, or USER_DEFINED.

label.description: A descriptor providing context about the relationship between associated records.

typeId.description: A unique integer identifier for the association type within its category.

userEnforcedMaxToObjectIds.description: The maximum number of target object IDs that a user can enforce in an association.

completedAt.description: The date and time when the batch operation was completed.

links.description: A collection of URLs linking to related documentation or resources associated with the batch operation.

requestedAt.description: The date and time when the batch operation was requested.

startedAt.description: The date and time when the batch operation started.

status.description: The current status of the batch operation, which can be CANCELED, COMPLETE, PENDING, or PROCESSING.

category.description: Specifies the category of the association, which can be HUBSPOT_DEFINED, INTEGRATOR_DEFINED, or USER_DEFINED.

typeId.description: A unique integer identifier for the specific association type within its category.

scopes.crm.objects.companies.sensitive.write.v2: Create or update sensitive properties on company records

scopes.crm.objects.contacts.sensitive.write.v2: Create or update sensitive properties on contact records
